executiveSummary: All 12 user stories are implemented and all 216 CPU-only tests pass. Ruff lint passes with no errors. Four wrapper functions (get_video_components, lotus_conditioning, ltxv_add_guide, text_generate_ltx2_prompt) omit the ensure_comfyui_on_path() call that the rest of the codebase uses before importing comfy_extras modules, creating a runtime fragility. Additionally, output unwrapping is inconsistent (some use .args[], others use the standard getattr(result, 'result', result)[] pattern), and mypy reports two errors in new code. Overall the iteration is substantially complete with minor consistency and robustness gaps.
minorObservations: get_video_components (video.py:259), lotus_conditioning (controlnet.py:141), ltxv_add_guide (controlnet.py:171), and text_generate_ltx2_prompt (textgen.py:176) perform inline 'from comfy_extras.*' imports without first calling ensure_comfyui_on_path(). Every other wrapper in the codebase uses this call. Without it these functions will raise ImportError when ComfyUI has not been added to sys.path by an earlier call.

get_video_components uses output.args[0]/output.args[1] for output extraction, while all other wrappers use the standard getattr(result, 'result', result)[n] pattern that handles both ComfyUI V3 NodeOutput and legacy tuple-style returns.
text_generate_ltx2_prompt uses result[0] directly without the V3-safe getattr(result, 'result', result) fallback.

lotus_conditioning accepts model and image parameters but passes neither to LotusConditioning.execute(). While the docstring explains this, it is misleading API surface — callers may expect the arguments to have an effect.
mypy reports 'Returning Any from function declared to return int | float' on image.py:344 (math_expression). The actual return value from the node is untyped.
mypy reports 'Unused type: ignore comment' on video.py:259 (get_video_components import line).

image.py and sampling.py wrappers use dedicated _get_*_type() helper functions for lazy imports, while controlnet.py, video.py, and textgen.py wrappers do inline imports. This inconsistency makes the codebase harder to maintain.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: The iteration delivers all 12 user stories with passing tests and clean lint. Five user stories (US-004, US-005, US-006, US-008, US-011) are partially compliant due to missing ensure_comfyui_on_path() calls, inconsistent output unwrapping, or minor mypy errors. Recommended refactors: (1) Add ensure_comfyui_on_path() before all comfy_extras imports in get_video_components, lotus_conditioning, ltxv_add_guide, and text_generate_ltx2_prompt — ideally by extracting _get_*_type() helpers matching the existing pattern. (2) Standardize output unwrapping to use the getattr(result, 'result', result)[n] pattern across all wrappers. (3) Fix the mypy return-type annotation in math_expression (cast or widen the annotation). (4) Remove the unused type:ignore comment in video.py:259. (5) Consider whether lotus_conditioning should accept model/image at all if it never uses them, or document the API contract more prominently.
